narrative:
Precinct Logan 1 (precinct in Hocking County) has 1,135 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
